name: Persefoni Carbon Accounting and Management API
what_it_does: Persefoni carbon accounting and climate management REST API for enterprises, financial institutions, and asset managers to measure, manage, and report greenhouse gas emissions across all three GHG Protocol scopes. Enables AI agents to manage activity data ingestion and emission calculation for enterprise carbon accounting automation, handle Scope 1, 2, and 3 emission categorization for GHG Protocol compliant reporting automation, access emission factor library and methodology selection for carbon calculation accuracy automation, retrieve TCFD climate disclosure report generation for investor climate reporting automation, manage net-zero pathway and science-based target tracking for climate strategy automation, handle supply chain Scope 3 emission collection from suppliers for value chain emission automation, access financial portfolio emission calculation for financial institution financed emission automation, retrieve regulatory reporting (CSRD, SEC climate disclosure) for compliance reporting automation, manage audit trail and calculation documentation for external assurance preparation automation, and integrate Persefoni with ERP, procurement, and sustainability management platforms for end-to-end enterprise carbon management.
use_cases: Calculating enterprise GHG emissions from carbon accounting automation agents
Generating TCFD reports from climate disclosure automation agents
Collecting Scope 3 data from supply chain emission automation agents
Tracking net-zero progress from climate strategy automation agents
not_for: Real estate portfolio ESG management (use Measurabl)
Operational energy management (use Schneider Electric or Siemens)
Environmental regulatory compliance reporting for EHS (use Enablon or Sphera)
best_when: An enterprise, financial institution, or asset manager wanting AI agents to automate GHG emission measurement, TCFD climate disclosure, Scope 3 supply chain data collection, and net-zero pathway tracking within Persefoni's carbon accounting platform.
avoid_when: GHG PROTOCOL BOUNDARY SELECTION FOR EMISSION INVENTORY: Automated emission inventory via Persefoni must apply correct organizational boundary (equity share, control approaches); automated Scope 1 inventory with incorrect boundary includes or excludes affiliates and joint ventures inconsistently; establish organizational boundary policy before automated emission calculation deployment. SEC CLIMATE DISCLOSURE MATERIALITY DETERMINATION: Automated SEC climate disclosure data preparation via Persefoni requires legal materiality determination for climate risk disclosures; automated disclosure without securities law materiality analysis creates SEC disclosure completeness risk; engage securities counsel for materiality determination before automated SEC climate filing preparation. EXTERNAL ASSURANCE DOCUMENTATION COMPLETENESS: Automated carbon accounting for externally assured GHG inventory via Persefoni must maintain complete audit trail with emission factor source, activity data provenance, and methodology documentation; automated calculation without full audit trail creates external assurance qualification risk.

auth.notes: Persefoni uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Tempe, Arizona HQ. Founded 2020 by Kentaro Kawamori and Chris Butterfield. Private (~$100M raised, SoftBank, Prelude Ventures). Carbon accounting and climate management for enterprises and financial institutions. GHG Protocol compliant. TCFD, CSRD, and SEC climate disclosure reporting. Financed emission calculation for banks and asset managers. Competes with Watershed, Salesforce Net Zero Cloud, and Sweep for enterprise carbon management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription for carbon accounting programs
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription based on enterprise complexity and emission source count; financial services and asset management editions; API access included in enterprise subscription
pricing.notes: Tempe AZ. Private (~$100M raised). Founded 2020. Annual subscription. Enterprise-complexity-based pricing. Financial services edition. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; emission and data queries throttled; webhooks for data ingestion and report events

known_agent_gotchas: EMISSION FACTOR SELECTION METHODOLOGY CONSISTENCY: Persefoni emission factor library includes multiple source options (EPA, IPCC, IEA, supplier-specific); automated emission calculation must apply consistent emission factor methodology across all periods for year-over-year comparability; automated factor selection without documented methodology creates GHG inventory that lacks the consistency required for trend analysis

SCOPE 3 CATEGORY 15 FINANCED EMISSIONS PCAF STANDARD: Automated financed emission calculation via Persefoni for financial institutions must apply PCAF (Partnership for Carbon Accounting Financials) standard; automated financed emission calculation without PCAF data quality score creates unreliable financed emission inventory for TCFD disclosure

CSRD DATA POINT COVERAGE COMPLETENESS: Automated CSRD reporting data preparation via Persefoni must cover all required ESRS E1 climate data points; CSRD double materiality assessment determines which data points are material; automated data collection without double materiality analysis may miss required CSRD data points; engage sustainability consultant for double materiality assessment before automated CSRD reporting workflow

ACTIVITY DATA QUALITY SCORING FOR ASSURANCE: Persefoni supports data quality scoring for emission activity data; automated emission calculation using estimated or modeled data (vs actual metered data) creates lower data quality score; automated inventory with high proportion of estimated data may not achieve external assurance; prioritize automated actual data collection over estimated data for assured emission categories

SUPPLIER SCOPE 3 DATA RESPONSE RATE MANAGEMENT: Automated Scope 3 Category 1 supplier emission data collection via Persefoni supplier portal has low industry average response rate (15-30%); automated supply chain emission workflow must implement fallback spend-based or hybrid calculation method for non-responding suppliers; automated Scope 3 that waits for supplier responses creates incomplete emission inventory for annual reporting

ANNUAL RECALCULATION PROTOCOL FOR BASE YEAR: GHG Protocol and Persefoni support base year recalculation when significant structural changes occur; automated emission trend comparison must implement recalculation protocol for acquisitions, divestitures, or methodology changes; automated YoY comparison without base year recalculation creates misleading emission trend for corporate climate communications
agent_readiness.security_notes: Carbon accounting. SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. GHG emission data, climate disclosure, and supply chain sustainability data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Carbon accounting. SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. GHG emission data and climate disclosure information.
